lsp.justification: Matches the GT’s key facts: 117 true direct .c includers via 59 bare `"eloop.h"` plus 58 `"utils/eloop.h"`, disjoint sets resolving to the same physical header, and no headers include eloop.h in either spelling. The only blemish is slightly confusing wording saying the direct set and transitive closure are “not equal,” but it immediately explains the transitive contribution is empty and the 117 direct includers are the full dependency set.
